name: diorite
description: Diorite - Zero-setup Minecraft modding IDE. Like Cursor/Replit but for Minecraft Java. Eliminates JDK/Gradle/mappings/mod loader setup.

scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:electron: cd electron && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:electron
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && python -m pytest -q || python -c "from app.services.template_service import TemplateService; print('Templates:', TemplateService().list_templates())"

author: Diorite Team
